mapper.sql: AA.BOARD_SEQ , AA.BOARD_MST_ID , AA.CATE_CD , AA.TITLE , AA.WRITER , AA.SORT_ORD , AA.DEL_YN , AA.ADMIN_DEL_CD , AA.ADMIN_DEL_RSN , AA.VIEWS , AA.FROM_DATE , AA.TO_DATE , AA.FIX_YN , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM
mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.board.mapper.BoardDAO.getListCount */
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM T_BOARD_INF AA
mapper.sql: BB.BOARD_CMT_SEQ , BB.BOARD_SEQ , BB.CONTENT , BB.DEL_YN , BB.ADMIN_DEL_CD , BB.ADMIN_DEL_RSN , BB.REF_ID , BB.CMT_ORD , BB.SORT_ORD , BB.SECRET_YN , BB.RGTR , TO_CHAR(BB.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , BB.CHNR , TO_CHAR(BB.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM
mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.board.mapper.BoardDAO.getCmt */
SELECT
, MEMB.NICKNAME AS REG_NAME , MEMB.MEMB_ID AS REG_ID FROM T_BOARD_CMT BB LEFT JOIN T_MEMB_INF MEMB ON BB.RGTR = MEMB.MEMB_SEQ
ORDER BY BB.BOARD_CMT_SEQ ASC, BB.REF_ID ASC, BB.CMT_ORD ASC
mapper.sql: AA.BOARD_SEQ , AA.BOARD_MST_ID , AA.CATE_CD , AA.TITLE , AA.WRITER , AA.PHONE , AA.EMAIL , AA.SORT_ORD , AA.ORG_SEQ , AA.DEL_YN , AA.ADMIN_DEL_CD , AA.ADMIN_DEL_RSN , AA.VIEWS , AA.FROM_DATE , AA.TO_DATE , AA.FIX_YN , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM
mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.board.mapper.BoardDAO.getInqrListount */
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM T_INQUIRY_INF AA WHERE AA.ORG_SEQ = 0 AND AA.DEL_YN = 'N'
